series_description: This series documents the issue of internal mail boxes and the collection of rent receipts.
retention_statement: Retain 3 years after end of year, then destroy.

series_description: This series documents the acceptance and shipment or receipt and release of certified or registered mail.
retention_statement: Retain 3 years after the last entry, then destroy.

series_description: This series documents the repair and maintenance of mailroom equipment.
retention_statement: Retain until final disposition of equipment, then destroy.

series_description: This series controls the use of mail or parcel meters and the accounting for charges incurred.
retention_statement: Retain 3 years after last entry, then destroy.

series_description: This series documents the control of incoming and outgoing mail.
retention_statement: Retain 1 year after last entry, then destroy.

series_description: This series documents the receipt and collection of funds for postage mail, COD mail and other collections.
retention_statement: Retain 3 years after collection, then destroy.

series_description: This series documents the payment of bills for postage or other mail services.
retention_statement: Retain 3 years after payment, then destroy.

series_description: This series documents the request for and/or receipt of refunds or adjustments from the USPS or other common carriers.
retention_statement: Retain 3 years after last activity, then destroy.

series_description: This series documents internal requests for postage, issue or postage and reimbursement, if applicable.
retention_statement: Retain 3 years after issue of postage, then destroy.

series_description: This series documents the shipment or receipt of parcels through common carriers (Fedex, UPS, couriers, etc) and subsequent bill and payment.
retention_statement: Retain 3 years after last activity, then destroy.
